title: Only Hammers
description: A simple mod that adds various type of hammers, that mine 3x1 area
body:
<center>

[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/discord/1051116089133777016?color=green&label=Discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=green&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/jVmUTGFMX5)  

# **Only Hammers**  
**Only Hammers** adds a wide variety of **hammers** that can mine a **3x1 area**, making mining faster and easier.  

</center>

---

## ⚒️ Tools  
- All hammers are based on **vanilla materials** (from **Wood** to **Netherite**).  
- **Mine in a 3x1 area**, perfect for clearing stone and ores quickly (like pickaxe).  
- If you **sneak (Shift)** while mining, the hammer will **break only 1 block** for more precision.  

---

## ⚙️ Customization  
The mod comes with **config files** that allow you to:  
- Change **durability** of the hammers.  
- Adjust the **mining radius** (default: 3x1).  

This makes the tools customizable to fit your gameplay style.  

---

## 📌 Compatibility & Versions  
- **Actively supported versions:** Minecraft 1.20.1, 1.21 and later  

---
